skill_targets.title: StreamlineHQ CLI Automation SDK
skill_targets.rationale: StreamlineHQ's CLI is actively used by the majority of engineering teams for CI pipeline orchestration. Usage is confirmed via internal tooling audit.
skill_targets.differentiation_hypothesis: A skill covering the CLI SDK would allow agents to author and debug automation pipelines without manual setup, reducing onboarding time by an estimated 60%.
skill_targets.existing_competition: Generic shell scripting guides; no agent-ready SDK skill exists

skill_targets.title: StreamlineHQ Webhook Integration API
skill_targets.rationale: Webhook API is used by a minority of teams building event-driven workflows. Usage inferred from GitHub issues and changelog entries.
skill_targets.differentiation_hypothesis: Agents with this skill can autonomously set up bidirectional webhook pipelines, a task currently requiring significant manual configuration.
skill_targets.existing_competition: Generic REST API guides; StreamlineHQ docs exist but are not agent-optimized

skill_targets.title: StreamlineHQ Plugin Development Framework
skill_targets.rationale: Plugin framework used exclusively by a small extensions team. Confirmed usage but limited internal audience.
skill_targets.differentiation_hypothesis: Enabling agents to scaffold and test plugins could accelerate the ecosystem, but the narrow audience limits booth-aha impact.
skill_targets.existing_competition: Internal wiki docs; no external skill exists

skill_targets.title: StreamlineHQ Legacy Import Tool
skill_targets.rationale: Legacy import tool used occasionally during migrations. Low confidence due to sparse documentation and infrequent usage.
skill_targets.differentiation_hypothesis: Narrow use case with limited reuse potential.
